hero.badge: Over 38+ years of selfless service and a proud tradition.
hero.title: A Safe Home for Daughters, a Sanctuary of Education and Values
hero.subtitle: Since 1988, with the blessings of Pujya Chande Bapa, this sacred place provides 100% free lodging, excellent education, and the courage for girls from villages and remote areas to live independently.

about.title: About Shri Jalaram Raghuvanshi Lohana Kanya Chatralay
about.description: Established with the blessings and values of Pujya Chande Bapa, this hostel provides village and remote area girls with not just lodging and boarding, but a secure home-like environment. Here, girls receive higher education free of charge, discover their inner potential, and become independent, confident individuals.
about.feature1Desc: Proper guidance and career development towards a bright future.
about.feature2Desc: Cultural values, discipline, and motherly affection just like home.

facilities.title: Our Facilities
facilities.subtitle: We do not just provide a place to stay; we offer a secure and nurturing home-like environment for the all-round development of girls.

bed.title: Lodging Facility
bed.description: Bright and clean rooms. Well-ventilated, tidy, and fully secure living arrangements.

restaurant.title: Nutritious Food
restaurant.description: Pure vegetarian meals. Fresh, delicious, and healthy breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

library.title: Study Room & Library
library.description: Quiet and study-friendly environment. Library books and calm study spaces for focused learning.

temple.title: Prayer Hall
temple.description: Daily prayers and values. A center for spiritual peace, morning hymns, discourses, and cultural activities.

health.title: Medical Care
health.description: Continuous health monitoring. Regular checkups, first-aid, and basic medical facilities.

cctv.title: 24x7 Security & CCTV
cctv.description: Fully secure campus. Round-the-clock security guards, CCTV cameras, and guidance of an experienced warden.

sports.title: Sports & Play
sports.description: Physical and mental growth. Sports equipment and an open playground for health and recreation.

hotTub.title: Hot Water Facility
hotTub.description: Hot water for warm water during winters and as needed.

admission.title: Admission Process
admission.subtitle: Start your daughter's bright future in just 3 simple steps.

step1.title: Obtain Form
step1.description: Download the admission form online from the website or collect it from the hostel office.

step2.title: Submit Documents
step2.description: Submit the filled form along with the required marksheet, Aadhar Card, and other papers at the office.

step3.title: Interview & Admission
step3.description: Admission will be finalized based on a general interview with the board of trustees and merit/need criteria.

img1.title: Grand Campus
img1.description: Our secure, well-ventilated, and sacred home-like hostel campus.

img2.title: Strength & Courage
img2.description: Cultivating confidence and fearlessness in our girls for a bright future.

img3.title: Meals & Togetherness
img3.description: Girls enjoying nutritious, home-style vegetarian meals together.

img4.title: Daily Prayers
img4.description: Devotional daily prayers for cultural and spiritual awakening.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions regarding admission, facilities, and hostel life.

q1.q: 1. Which grades and age groups of girls are eligible for admission?
q1.a: Lohana and Saraswat Brahmin community girls studying in Grades 1 to 12, college students, or those pursuing lifecraft studies are eligible, admitted based on merit and financial need.

q2.q: 2. Is there any fee charged for lodging and boarding?
q2.a: No, absolutely not. The trust provides 100% free lodging, boarding, study materials, clothing, toiletries, and school fee assistance.

q3.q: 3. What security arrangements are in place for the girls?
q3.a: We prioritize safety above all. The campus features 24-hour CCTV surveillance, security guards, and constant presence of experienced wardens.

q4.q: 4. How can we make financial contributions or donations to the hostel?
q4.a: Donations can be made via cash, cheque, draft, or direct bank transfer listed on the website. The trust provides income tax exemption certificates under Sections 12A & 80G.
